title: Create an account, log in, and open the protected profile
description: This test verifies a new user can sign up, authenticate, and access their protected profile successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with a new unique username
Fill in the email field with a new unique email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the dietary preferences field with a valid preference
Fill in the crowd tolerance field with a valid tolerance value
Fill in the favorite team field with a valid team name
Fill in the preferred gate field with a valid gate name
Submit the signup form
Log in with the newly created credentials
Open the protected profile view
Verify the profile details are displayed
Verify the user remains authenticated

title: Verify backend health status
description: A user verifies the service health endpoint reports the application and database are healthy before planning a visit.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/health
Verify the service health status is displayed
Verify the database health status is displayed

title: Verify service health and stadium availability
description: This test verifies a visitor can open the app, check service health, and view the stadium list before choosing a venue.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home page
Open the service health view
Open the stadium list view
Verify service health information is displayed
Verify the stadium list is displayed

title: View a venue’s gate configuration and crowd status
description: This test verifies a visitor can inspect a specific stadium’s venue details and live gate crowd information for match-day planning.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home page
Open a stadium detail view
Select a specific stadium from the list
Open the venue gate information view
Open the live crowd status view
Verify the venue gate configuration is displayed
Verify live gate crowd information is displayed

title: Log out of the account
description: This test verifies an authenticated user can end their session and is no longer shown protected profile content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Log in with valid credentials
Open the account menu or session controls
Log out of the account
Verify the session is ended
Verify protected profile content is no longer accessible

title: View current gate crowd status
description: A user checks live gate wait times for a known stadium to decide how to enter the venue.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/crowd/Wankhede Stadium Mumbai
Verify live gate wait times are displayed

title: Reject an invalid login attempt
description: This test verifies the app blocks access when a user submits incorrect login credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with an invalid username
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is displayed
Verify the protected profile view is not shown

title: Browse available stadiums
description: A user opens the stadium list to confirm the app can show available venues for trip planning.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/stadiums
Verify a list of stadiums is displayed

title: Generate a match-day itinerary
description: This test verifies a fan can request an optimized itinerary for a stadium using crowd tolerance and dietary preferences and see recommendations returned.

steps.description: Navigate to the itinerary planner
Fill in the prompt field with a match-day planning request
Fill in the stadium field with a valid stadium name
Fill in the crowd tolerance field with a valid tolerance value
Fill in the dietary preferences field with a valid dietary preference
Submit the itinerary request
Verify an optimized itinerary is displayed
Verify recommendations are shown for the selected stadium

title: View venue details for a known stadium
description: A user looks up a specific stadium and sees its venue metadata and gate configuration.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/stadiums
Click the stadium entry for Wankhede Stadium Mumbai
Verify venue details are displayed
Verify gate configuration details are displayed

title: Receive live crowd updates while telemetry changes
description: This test verifies the app reflects updated gate crowd telemetry when live crowd information changes during a session.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home page
Open the live crowd status view for a stadium
Wait for a live crowd update
Open the crowd update simulation view
Submit a crowd update with valid waiting time and gate information
Verify the displayed crowd status updates
Verify the live telemetry view reflects the new values

title: Update saved profile preferences
description: This test verifies an authenticated user can change stored profile preferences and see the updated profile reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Log in with valid credentials
Open the profile settings view
Update the dietary preferences field with a new valid preference
Update the preferred gate field with a different valid gate
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile preferences are displayed
Verify the saved changes persist in the profile view

title: Review 30-minute crowd trend
description: A user reviews the recent crowd trend for a known stadium to plan arrival timing.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/crowd/trend/Wankhede Stadium Mumbai
Verify a 30-minute crowd trend is displayed

title: See crowd trend updates for the next 30 minutes
description: This test verifies a visitor can view the short-term crowd trend for a stadium while planning arrival timing.

steps.description: Navigate to the app home page
Open a stadium detail view
Open the crowd trend view
Verify a 30-minute crowd trend is displayed
Verify the trend is associated with the selected stadium

title: Update simulated gate wait time
description: A user changes a gate's simulated waiting time and sees the updated telemetry reflected in the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/crowd/Wankhede Stadium Mumbai
Trigger a crowd update for a gate with a valid waiting time
Verify the updated gate wait time is displayed
Verify the crowd status changes are reflected

title: Receive live crowd updates
description: A user opens the live telemetry stream and sees incoming crowd update messages while crowd status changes occur.

steps.description: Navigate to /ws/crowd
Open the live crowd telemetry stream
Verify live crowd update messages are displayed

title: Prevent duplicate account creation
description: This test verifies the app rejects signing up with credentials that already exist and keeps the user on the registration flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Create a new account with valid details
Submit the signup form again with the same username and email
Verify a registration error is displayed
Verify the account creation flow is not completed twice

title: Recover access from the forgot-password flow
description: This test verifies a user can submit a password recovery request and receive confirmation in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Open the password recovery flow
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Submit the forgot-password request
Verify a password recovery confirmation is visible
Verify the recovery flow remains available for another request

title: Use the feedback form to record a visit review
description: This test verifies a user can submit route, food, and gate satisfaction feedback and see a successful confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to the feedback form
Fill in the username field with a valid username
Fill in the accepted recommendation field with a positive recommendation
Fill in the rejected recommendation field with an alternative recommendation
Fill in the route satisfaction field with a valid score
Fill in the food satisfaction field with a valid score
Fill in the gate satisfaction field with a valid score
Submit the feedback form
Verify a feedback confirmation is displayed
Verify the submitted feedback is reflected in the UI

title: View feedback after using recommendations
description: This test verifies a user can complete a recommendation-driven trip and then submit feedback about route, food, and gate experience.

steps.description: Navigate to the itinerary planner
Generate an itinerary for a valid stadium
Open the feedback form from the recommendations flow
Fill in the feedback fields with valid values
Submit the feedback form
Verify a feedback confirmation is displayed
Verify the feedback is linked to the completed recommendations flow

title: Handle unknown stadium lookup
description: A user searches for a stadium that does not exist and sees a not-found result instead of venue details.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/venue/Unknown Stadium
Verify a not-found message is displayed

title: Handle an incomplete itinerary request
description: This test verifies the itinerary planner does not produce an itinerary when required inputs are missing or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to the itinerary planner
Fill in the prompt field with a match-day planning request
Submit the itinerary request with required fields left incomplete
Verify an itinerary validation or failure message is displayed
Verify no itinerary is generated

title: Reject invalid crowd update input
description: A user submits an invalid crowd simulation request and sees validation feedback instead of an applied update.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/crowd/Wankhede Stadium Mumbai
Trigger a crowd update with missing or invalid waiting time
Verify a crowd update validation error is displayed

title: Show validation for incomplete feedback
description: This test verifies the feedback form blocks submission when required fields are missing or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to the feedback form
Fill in the username field with a valid username
Submit the feedback form with required fields left empty
Verify feedback validation errors are displayed
Verify the feedback is not submitted
